welcome:
Welcome, {name}! 🎉
I'm Maya's Lab Bot — memes, fun tools, utilities and a full economy system.
Check the menu button below, or type /help.
daily_success:
✅ Daily bonus claimed: +{amount} coins!
🔥 Streak: {streak} days
daily_already: ⏳ You already claimed today's bonus. Come back tomorrow!
admin_only: ⛔ This command is for admins only.
banned_user: 🚫 You are banned from using this bot.
not_enough_coins: 🪙 Not enough coins. This feature costs {price} coins, you have {coins}.
error_generic: ❌ Something went wrong. Please try again.
help_title: 📋 Tap the menu button below to see all commands.
feature_not_configured: ⚙️ This feature isn't set up yet (needs an API key). Let an admin know.
